001package net.okocraft.box.api.event.stock;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.api.model.item.BoxItem;
004import net.okocraft.box.api.model.stock.StockHolder;
005import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
006
007/**
008 * A {@link StockEvent} called when the amount of the stock is set.
009 */
010public class StockSetEvent extends StockEvent {
011
012    private final BoxItem item;
013    private final int amount;
014    private final int previousAmount;
015
016    /**
017     * The constructor of {@link StockEvent}.
018     *
019     * @param stockHolder    the stockholder of the event
020     * @param item           the item of the stock
021     * @param amount         the current amount of the stock
022     * @param previousAmount the amount of stock before set
023     */
024    public StockSetEvent(@NotNull StockHolder stockHolder, @NotNull BoxItem item, int amount, int previousAmount) {
025        super(stockHolder);
026        this.item = item;
027        this.amount = amount;
028        this.previousAmount = previousAmount;
029    }
030
031    /**
032     * Gets the item of the stock.
033     *
034     * @return the item of the stock
035     */
036    public @NotNull BoxItem getItem() {
037        return item;
038    }
039
040    /**
041     * Gets the current amount of the stock.
042     *
043     * @return the current amount of the stock
044     */
045    public int getAmount() {
046        return amount;
047    }
048
049    /**
050     * Gets the amount of stock before set.
051     *
052     * @return the amount of stock before set
053     */
054    public int getPreviousAmount() {
055        return previousAmount;
056    }
057
058    @Override
059    public String toString() {
060        return "StockSetEvent{" +
061                "stockholder=" + getStockHolder() +
062                ", item=" + item +
063                ", amount=" + amount +
064                '}';
065    }
066}
